footer.tagline: Empowering patients with control over their health data.

hero.subheadline: Secure, patient-owned health records built on blockchain and AI technology. Access your complete medical history anytime, anywhere.

about.missionDesc: We believe that health data belongs to the patient. Our mission is to create a world where every person has complete control over their medical information—accessible anywhere, anytime, and shared only with their consent.
about.storyP1: Patient Bio was born from a deeply personal tragedy. In eighth grade, our founder, Sabbir Hossain, watched his sister struggle through a critical medical emergency where the healthcare system failed her.
about.storyP2: As his family moved between hospitals, her medical data didn't move with them. The fragmented system forced constant, redundant testing—wasting life-saving time and resources while her condition worsened. After 20 days of systemic failure, she passed away.
about.storyP3: Driven by this loss, Sabbir launched Patient Bio to ensure no other family faces the same mapless journey. By leveraging blockchain technology, he built a platform that finally puts patients in absolute control of their own health data.
about.storyP4: Today, Patient Bio is transforming healthcare into a connected, data-driven ecosystem where medical history is no longer a barrier to care, but a bridge to saving lives.
about.valuesDesc: These core principles guide everything we do at Patient Bio.
about.patientFirstDesc: Every decision we make starts with one question: How does this benefit patients?
about.transparencyDesc: We believe in radical transparency in how we handle and protect your health data.
about.privacyByDesignDesc: Security and privacy aren't afterthoughts—they're built into everything we create.
about.innovationDesc: We constantly push boundaries to deliver cutting-edge healthcare technology.

contact.subtitle: Have questions? Need support? Want to partner with us? We're here to help.
contact.sentDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

team.subtitle: Our diverse team of healthcare experts, engineers, and innovators is united by a single mission: putting patients in control of their health data.

features.title: Everything you need to manage your
features.subtitle: Our comprehensive platform gives you complete control over your medical records with cutting-edge security and seamless accessibility.
features.blockchainRecordsDesc: Every action is cryptographically hashed and linked using Merkle trees for tamper-proof security.
features.aiInsightsDesc: Get intelligent health summaries, medication interaction checks, and trend analysis powered by AI.
features.patientSovereigntyDesc: You own your data. Control exactly who can access your health information with smart consent.
features.encryptionDesc: AES-256 end-to-end encryption with SHA-256 hash chains protect your data at rest and in transit.
features.offlineAccessDesc: Access your critical health records even without internet connection via PWA caching.
features.biometricSecurityDesc: Secure access with fingerprint and face recognition using WebAuthn/FIDO2 standards.
features.globalInteropDesc: FHIR R4 and HL7 v2 compatible. Access your records anywhere with cross-border data transfers.
features.familySharingDesc: Manage health records for your entire family with granular, consent-based access controls.

onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let's take a quick tour to help you get started with managing your health records.
onboarding.profileDesc: Start by adding your personal information. This helps healthcare providers identify you quickly.
onboarding.uploadDesc: Upload prescriptions, lab reports, and medical documents. They're encrypted and secure.
onboarding.shareDesc: Create time-limited links to share your data with doctors. You control who sees what.
onboarding.qrDesc: Scan a doctor's QR code to request a connection, or show yours to share your records instantly.
onboarding.appointmentsDesc: Schedule and manage appointments with your doctors. Get reminders so you never miss a visit.
onboarding.medicationsDesc: Monitor your vitals and health metrics over time to spot patterns and stay proactive.

adminImport.title: System Data Import
adminImport.description: Restore system data from a previously exported JSON backup file.

adminImport.checksumInvalid: Checksum mismatch — file may have been modified
adminImport.upsertDesc: Updates existing records and inserts new ones.
adminImport.skipDesc: Only inserts new records; skips any that already exist.
adminImport.replaceDesc: Deletes existing records by ID and re-inserts them.

adminImport.piiImportWarning: This import includes tables with personally identifiable information.
adminImport.noImports: No imports have been performed yet.
